Who We Are
A Movement Built on Equity & Utu
🇰🇪 Pamoja Tunasimama

Usawa Kenya is a registered youth collective founded in 2024, uniting young Kenyans through equity, fairness, innovation, and genuine human connection across all 47 counties.

We believe Kenya's youth are not the leaders of tomorrow — they are the leaders of today. Every programme we build, every connection we make, is grounded in that belief.

⚖️

Equity First

Creating fair opportunities regardless of background, county, or circumstance.

🤝

Utu — Shared Humanity

"Mtu ni watu." We are strengthened by genuine mutual care.

💡

Homegrown Innovation

Kenyan problems solved by Kenyan youth with Kenyan ingenuity.

Join Us Today Our Work →
Our Framework
The Five Pillars

Five foundations that guide everything we do across Kenya.

🤝

Mahusiano — Relationships

Deep, trust-based connections across all 47 counties through mentorship chains and cross-county exchanges.

⚖️

Haki — Justice & Equity

Advocacy, policy engagement, and community accountability pushing Kenya closer to fairness for all youth.

💡

Ubunifu — Innovation

Entrepreneurial thinking, hackathons, and incubation support for homegrown ideas born from lived experience.

🧩

Suluhisho — Problem-Solving

Community labs identifying root causes of local issues and prototyping scalable, evidence-informed responses.

📖

Elimu — Education

Peer-to-peer learning, skills bootcamps, and knowledge platforms accessible to every member, everywhere.

Our Flagship Initiative
Workforce Unit

Kenya's number one youth employment and empowerment project — connecting young Kenyans to real opportunities.

🏆 Priority No.1 · Flagship Project

WORKFORCE UNIT

A bold, youth-led initiative tackling Kenya's unemployment crisis head-on. Workforce Unit connects young Kenyans to real job opportunities, builds career-ready skills, and partners with employers who believe in the potential of youth. We don't just prepare youth for work — we change how Kenya sees its young workforce.

💼

Career Readiness

Practical skills training tailored to real employer needs — professional conduct, workplace communication, and problem-solving.

🤝

Employer Connect

Direct partnerships with youth-friendly employers. Internships, apprenticeships, and full employment pipelines built for our members.

📄

CV & Job Applications

Hands-on CV building, cover letter writing, LinkedIn coaching, and peer review — so every application stands out.

🎤

Interview Preparation

Mock interview sessions, confidence coaching, body language training, and real feedback from industry professionals.

🌍

County Placement Network

Opportunities mapped across all 47 counties — so youth don't have to leave their communities to build a career.

📊

Progress & Outcomes

Every participant tracked from onboarding to employment. Real data, real accountability, real results.

47Counties Covered
FreeFor All Members
50+Employer Partners

More Programmes
Key Initiatives
🎤

Usawa Speaks

Spoken word, debate and public dialogue — open forums for youth on equity and governance. Quarterly across counties.

💡

Jua Kali Innovation Lab

3-month incubator for youth-led social enterprises. Mentorship, seed grants, and peer accountability structures.

📚

Maarifa Digital

Free digital literacy and professional skills training — online and in community hubs across all of Kenya.

🗺️

County Connect

Annual cross-county exchange pairing youth from different regions to collaborate on shared challenges.

🔍

Haki Watch

Youth-led civic accountability monitoring government budgets, performance, and service delivery outcomes.

🧠

Afya ya Akili

Mental health peer-support — trained counsellors, safe circles, and community events normalising wellness.

Get the latest news, opportunities, and updates from Usawa Kenya delivered to your inbox.

Our Journey
What We're Doing

From founding to the future — Usawa Kenya's live timeline.

October 2024
🏛️ Usawa Kenya Founded
12 founding members in Nairobi. First General Assembly, constitution ratified, Executive Council elected. Motto adopted: Pamoja Tunasimama.
Milestone
November 2024
🌐 Website & Social Launch
Official website live. X (@UsawaKenya) and Instagram (@usawa.kenya) activated. Amani AI chatbot deployed for 24/7 member support.
Completed
January 2025
💼 Workforce Unit Launches
Flagship project goes live. First cohort of 30 youth onboarded — career readiness, employer connections, CV coaching, and interview preparation.
Flagship
February 2025
🎤 Usawa Speaks — Nairobi
120 youth at Nairobi Railway Museum. Three county proposals submitted directly to Nairobi County Assembly as a direct outcome.
Completed
April–May 2025 · NOW
🚀 Workforce Unit Cohort 2 — Open
50 slots available. Employer partner programme expanding. Career readiness sessions underway. Deadline May 15, 2025. Apply: hello@usawakenya.org
● Live Now
May 2025
🗺️ County Connect — 5 Counties
Youth from Nairobi, Mombasa, Kisumu, Nakuru and Eldoret in a 48-hour collaborative challenge format.
Coming Soon
Q3 2025
📱 Usawa App Beta
Mobile app with member portal, Workforce Unit, events calendar, and Amani AI. Android-first launch.
Planned
Q4 2025
🏛️ National Assembly — All 47 Counties
First national General Assembly. Strategic plan 2026–2028 vote. Usawa Scholars Fund launch.
Planned

Become a Member
Join USAWA Kenya

Any Kenyan youth aged 15–35. Free to join. Be part of a movement shaping a balanced, progressive nation.

Who Can Join
  • Any Kenyan youth aged 15 to 35 years
  • Committed to equity, fairness, and utu
  • Willing to actively participate — not just observe
  • Agrees to uphold the Usawa Kenya Code of Conduct
  • Diaspora Kenyans with commitment to community at home are welcome
  • No membership fee for founding cohort members
Rights & Responsibilities
  • Right to vote and stand for leadership positions
  • Access to all learning, training, and incubation programmes
  • Right to propose initiatives and call General Assembly motions
  • Attend at least 60% of chapter meetings annually
  • Mentor at least one newer member per year
  • Uphold the motto and values in all spaces
Apply via Email → Call +254 700 000 000
